18.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
18.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

18.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
18.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
(begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

18.gl: Chebron, a place in Palestine, also the name of two Israelites
